title: Task runner launcher command not found on AWS Fargate
symptom: When attempting to run the n8n runner on AWS Fargate, the error 'command /usr/local/bin/task-runner-launcher not found' is displayed.
not_this_if: Running n8n locally or on a different environment
root_cause: AWS Fargate requires specific configurations for entrypoints and commands. The command for the task-runner-launcher was not recognized because the entrypoint was not set correctly, leading to the command not being found.
fix_steps: Set the entrypoint in the Fargate configuration to '/usr/local/bin/task-runner-launcher'
Add 'javascript' as an argument to the entrypoint
agent_instruction: Configure the entrypoint for the n8n runner on AWS Fargate to include the task-runner-launcher path.
